overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a space simulation game showing flight through a dense asteroid field toward illuminated structures. The player navigates past debris and glowing navigation markers in a dark space environment with futuristic HUD elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: open asteroid field with distant station structure

agents.ego_description: piloting spacecraft forward through sparse asteroid field toward distant orange-lit structure

entered.detail: scattered rocky debris floating in space, illuminated by distant light sources
large distant structure with orange illuminated windows and structural lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person cockpit view flying through a sparse asteroid field. The spacecraft moves steadily toward a distant orange-lit station structure visible ahead, with rocky debris passing by on all sides in the dark space environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense asteroid field with navigation markers

events.description: green navigation lights appear and multiply throughout the asteroid field

agents.ego_description: navigating through denser asteroid field while approaching green navigation lights

entered.detail: glowing green spherical navigation markers floating among the asteroids

segments.scene_description: As the spacecraft progresses, green navigation lights suddenly appear scattered throughout the field. The asteroid density increases significantly, and the orange station grows larger in the center of the view while the green markers provide navigation reference points.

scene_state.functional_zone: tight corridor between large cylindrical space structures

events.description: entering tight corridor between massive cylindrical structures in the asteroid field

agents.ego_description: carefully maneuvering between large cylindrical structures while avoiding dense debris

entered.detail: massive dark cylindrical structure with illuminated orange accents passing by on the left
large cylindrical structure with glowing orange lights visible on the right side

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft enters a narrow corridor flanked by massive cylindrical structures on both sides. The orange station looms closer ahead while green navigation lights scatter to the sides. The pilot makes small course adjustments to navigate the tight space between the large structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: clearing asteroid field approaching blue-lit structure cluster

events.description: blue illuminated structures become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: exiting dense debris field and approaching blue-lit structure cluster ahead

entered.detail: cluster of structures with bright blue illumination visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft clears the narrow corridor and the large cylindrical structures pass behind. A new destination emerges ahead - a cluster of structures illuminated with blue lights. The orange station falls to the left rear as the craft approaches the blue-lit area, with the green navigation lights fading into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit journey through a dark asteroid field that transitions from a sparse void into a dense industrial corridor and finally toward a new illuminated destination. It begins with a steady flight past rocky debris toward a distant orange-lit station structure. As the spacecraft progresses, the asteroid density increases and green navigation lights emerge to guide the path while the orange station grows larger in the center of the view. The scene then shifts as the craft enters a narrow corridor flanked by massive cylindrical structures, requiring small course adjustments to navigate the tight space. Finally, the spacecraft clears the corridor and the orange station falls to the rear as the camera turns toward a new cluster of structures illuminated with blue lights.
